title: Organization entity (ONT-E-22, D-04)
description: An organization (regulator, manufacturer, operator, research institute, standards body, consultancy). MANDATORY in v0.1.0 alongside Person because both are URI resolution targets for provenance.actor / provenance.reviewer / source.published_by (see _meta.schema.json#/$defs/provenance + ADR-005). Composes entity.base.schema.json via allOf + $ref + unevaluatedProperties: false (Pitfall #1 lock; NEVER additionalProperties: false). Per ADR-002 / RESEARCH.md Gap Resolution #6, 6 fields minimum drawn from W3C PROV-O / schema.org / FOAF intersection. ROR live resolution and richer hierarchical org structures deferred to v0.2.0+. The jurisdiction enum aligns with RegulationClause.jurisdiction (Plan 05) and the future ontology/vocabularies/jurisdictions.yaml so Organizations and the regulations they issue can be cross-checked. URI form: aviationkb://organization/<slug>@<version>. Schema version: 0.1.0.

name.description: Canonical display name in Latin script. Bilingual variants belong in i18n.label (zh + en). Examples: 'Federal Aviation Administration', 'European Union Aviation Safety Agency', 'Civil Aviation Administration of China'.

org_type.description: Top-level organization category. regulator = civil aviation authority (FAA / EASA / CAAC / etc). manufacturer = airframe / engine / component OEM. operator = airline / military operator. research_institute = NASA / DLR / universities. standards_body = SAE / RTCA / ASTM / ISO. consultancy = engineering services firm.

jurisdiction.description: Optional jurisdiction tag. Aligns with RegulationClause.jurisdiction (Plan 05) and the future ontology/vocabularies/jurisdictions.yaml. Use only when the organization is itself a regulator OR is operating under a single primary jurisdiction; multi-jurisdiction operators should leave this unset.

ror.description: Research Organization Registry (ROR) URL. 9-character lowercase alphanumeric ID after the host. Format-checked here; live resolution against ror.org deferred to v0.2.0+.

lei.description: Legal Entity Identifier (ISO 17442). 20 uppercase alphanumeric characters. Format-checked here; live resolution against gleif.org deferred to v0.2.0+.

external_ids.description: Optional external identifiers. Both sub-fields optional; object itself may be omitted.
